name: Hyperion Deposit
description:
Here Hyperion droped his things to release weight to reach the sky and
depose Jupiter. Now this place is used to communion of things. Peoples come
here to drop things useless and get other things. Here you can drop things
to help other clan members and get things who'll help you in your journey.
There only one exit here, it leaves Down. The passage to Up was sealed by
Jupiter when he recovered the trone.
